title: selaginella adunca
intro: Selaginella adunca, a species of spore-producing plant commonly known as the hooked spikemoss, is a type of vascular cryptogam. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella adunca include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and can also be applied topically to skin conditions.
